title: Mayor Owens Extends Draft Climate Action Plan Public Commenting Period
summary: Mayor Sharon F. Owens announced an extension of the public commenting period for Syracuse's draft inaugural Climate Action Plan, now open until May 8, 2026. The plan leverages greenhouse gas emission inventory models to identify climate action opportunities and implementation strategies, with final adoption expected by Syracuse Common Council later in 2026. Funding was provided through the NYS Climate Smart Communities Grant Program.

entity_refs.name: New York State Department of Environmental Conservation

political_signal.description: Mayor demonstrates commitment to climate action and environmental sustainability as core city initiative with emphasis on inclusive public engagement and state-level funding leverage.
